title: Paper Item Frames | 纸质物品展示框
description: Paper-made item frames, texture and recipe. 纸质的物品展示框材质和对应配方。
body:
- Simply thought the original item frames looked not so recognizable, so I drew a paper-like background and dark wooden stick frame, and i'm sharing it here.  
- The glowing version is thought to have both the paper and the wooden frame bleached, while the regular version has eye-protecting yellowish paper, similar to that in books.  
- There's an optional datapack **below** -- a recipe for using paper instead of leather if you want to be more realistic. After all, item frames are used as labels most of the time so it makes more sense.  

- 就是觉得原版物品展示框看着费眼睛，不清晰，画了个像纸一样的背景和深色木棍边框，分享一下。  
- 荧光版的设定是纸和木框都被漂白了，普通版是护眼黄纸，类似书里那种。  
- 想更真实的话**下面**有数据包可选，用纸代替皮革的合成配方，毕竟展示框大多时候用来做标签，也合理。 

数据包（选装） | Datapack(optional):  [https://modrinth.com/datapack/paper-item-frame-recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/paper-item-frame-recipe)
